failures.error_message: iNova repository is not accessible in this cloud execution environment. notes: RECURRING (day 47): env_problem — iNova repo unreachable in cloud session for 47 consecutive days (2026-05-20 through 2026-07-05). Credentials tried: GITHUB_TOKEN (14-char), GITHUB_PAT_QA_BOT.
